title: 17 inches - Mesh Food Cover Tent Umbrella, Jsdoin 6 Pack Food Domes, Food Covers Mesh Pop Up Nets for Outdoors, Screen Tents, Parties Picnics, BBQs, Reusable and Collapsible (White)
features: 【Large size food covers tent umbrella】: 6-pack pop-up mesh food covers, 43 x 43 cm, large enough to cover full plates of food
【Strong and foldable】 The frame of the food umbrella tent is made of high-quality electroplated steel, so it can provide strong support, and is very easy to jump up and fold for storage

【Fine polyester mesh white food mask】: This mesh protects food and ensures food safety while maintaining ventilation and visibility of food. It is very suitable for all indoor and outdoor areas, such as garden barbecue, picnic, camping trip, swimming pool party, dry excess vegetables, etc.
【Washable pop-up screen food cover】: it is easy to clean and can be cleaned manually. If food is attached to it, just wash it in some cold water, soak it in warm soapy water, open it and dry it.

【90-day after-sales guarantee】: We provide the products of the highest quality and the best customer service. If you are not satisfied with the mesh food mask. Please contact us and we will be happy to give you a full refund or send you a replacement.
description: Product Description Warm Notice: When you open or close them, don't try to force them, please handle these with some care to prevent breaking them. When you use it to protect your plants from squirrels/birds, you need put something to tie/weigh them down in case of wind blow it away. Collapsible： Easy to use & store, pull Up to open, press and pull Down to fold. Thicken and Reinforce Steel Rod Framework Superior quality thicken and reinforce steel rod framework, which is more durable and solid, support with enhanced longevity. Superior quality mesh net to keep bugs away completely. Small umbrella push-pull design is easy to use. A fine-woven nylon lace mesh screen Upgrade encrypted high density food cover mesh, It used high density nylon lace mesh to prevent the tiny bugs enter and ensure the food clean, The beautiful lace bottom add more romantic in your life. Perfect Size with 6 pack of 17 inches The dome tent designed with 17" x 17" which is large enough to cover most plates & dishes, accommodates for dishes up to 9" tall.
